S.FORM: Jimmie Baker sraral hya ga si syuw na NBA, wal malax misu qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 12, Jimmie Baker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *immie Œ≤aker s~…ïraral ƒßja …£a s~…ïi s~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malax mis~…ïu qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj **, *immie Œ≤aker, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
